MONCLER bubble wrinkled shirt-style jacket and pants set, made of a cotton blend fabric with 76% high cotton content and 24% polyester fiber. The high cotton content ensures softness, skin-friendly, and good breathability, while the polyester fiber adds wrinkle resistance and elasticity, reducing shrinkage. Pre-shrunk for minimal size changes during washing. The fabric combines wrinkle resistance, quick-drying, and easy care with good wear experience and strong breathability. The bubble yarn speed is about 20% higher than the ground yarn speed, creating a bubbly texture with a clear grid pattern. Sizes: 1-2-3-4 S-XL.

MONCLER Bubble Pleated Logo Shorts are made of a cotton blend fabric consisting of 76% high-quality cotton and 24% polyester. The high cotton content ensures softness, skin-friendly feel, and good breathability. The addition of a small amount of polyester balances the fabric's wrinkle resistance and elasticity, significantly reducing shrinkage. Pre-shrunk treatment minimizes size changes during washing. The fusion of these materials combines wrinkle resistance, quick-drying, and easy care properties without compromising on comfort and breathability. The bubble yarn speed is about 20% higher than the ground yarn speed during weaving, creating naturally raised bubble units. By alternating yarn placement and floating weave changes, a clear grid framework is built between bubble units. Finally, high-temperature heat setting locks in the three-dimensional bubble effect and grid pattern. Sizes available: S-XL.

MONCLER collaboration embroidered cotton shorts, made of single-sided fish scale fabric woven with cotton as the base. The front is a smooth knitted surface, with a three-dimensional loop formed by the floating yarn weaving technique of the knitting machine on the skin-touching side, adding fluffiness and a delicate touch. The embroidered letter logo on the back panel is created with 16,000 stitches + 18,000 stitches using an embroidery machine. The embroidery frame is driven by a dual-axis linear guide, with a frame movement accuracy of up to 0.01mm, ensuring precise positioning of the embroidery pattern, with straight and delicate overall stitching. The fabric is comfortable, soft, and color-consistent without color deviation, allowing for stylish coordination with the same style for various occasions. Customized accessories, complete with three labels, available in unisex sizes S-XL.
